name: Body Mirror
description: An innovative health platform that combines advanced AI, neuroscience, and immersive games to track and enhance brain and body health. Features real-time pose estimation, motion-controlled gaming experiences, and comprehensive health tracking powered by cutting-edge technology.
tagline: AI & Sensor-Based Game Development | Motion Control Expert
myRole: Worked as a Game Developer with a UK-based software house, responsible for creating innovative games that use sensor tools to control movement and capture player stats. Collaborated with a multidisciplinary team including web developers, mobile application developers, brain scientists, and designers to achieve optimal game performance. Leveraged sensor technologies to create immersive, motion-controlled gaming experiences with accurate stat tracking.

name: LUDO CRUISE
description: A commercially successful multiplayer Ludo game with real-time online connectivity, multiple game modes, in-app purchases, and ads integration. Features cross-platform multiplayer, competitive rankings, seasonal events, and social features including chat and friend lists.
tagline: Real-time Multiplayer & Networking | Gameplay Systems Expert
myRole: Handled all gameplay mechanics and multiplayer services for the application. Developed and implemented all game modes with complete multiplayer functionalities including real-time chat, game state synchronization, matchmaking, and seamless multiplayer gameplay. Ensured smooth network performance and low latency for an optimal multiplayer experience.

name: LUMBER TYCOON INC
description: A hyper-casual idle simulation game with millions of downloads featuring incremental gameplay, unlockable upgrades, resource management, and offline progression. Built with scalable architecture supporting dynamic events, seasonal content, and live operations.
tagline: Idle Game Design & Economy | Mobile Optimization Specialist
myRole: Developed a complete idle simulation game with focus on engaging gameplay mechanics and mobile optimization. Designed and implemented all AI systems from scratch for intelligent NPC behaviors. Carefully balanced in-game economy to maintain player engagement and fun as the game progresses. Focused heavily on user retention through strategic progression systems and rewarding gameplay loops.

name: ALISHA ACADEMY KIDS LEARNING
description: An award-winning educational game for children featuring interactive mini-games, gamified learning, and progress tracking. Covers mathematics, language arts, science, and creative arts with age-appropriate content, parental controls, and accessibility features.
tagline: Educational Game Design | UI/UX & Gamification Expert
myRole: Designed and implemented interactive educational mini-games with progressive difficulty. Created adaptive learning algorithms that adjust content based on player performance. Collaborated with educational experts to ensure pedagogical effectiveness. Implemented accessibility features high contrast mode, and adjustable difficulty. Built robust parental dashboard and progress reporting system.

name: SNIPER FURY
description: A tactical FPS sniper game with realistic ballistics, wind mechanics, breath control, and immersive weapon customization. Features multiple campaign modes, zombie waves, competitive PvP, and an extensive weapon upgrade system with realistic recoil patterns.
tagline: FPS Mechanics & Ballistics | VFX & Team Lead
myRole: Led a team of developers and designers to deliver this tactical FPS sniper game. Implemented realistic ballistics system with wind simulation, bullet drop, and penetration mechanics. Developed enemy AI behaviors using state machines for intelligent tactical responses. Created comprehensive weapon customization system with upgradeable components and realistic recoil patterns. Designed immersive level layouts and optimized rendering pipeline for smooth mobile gameplay.

name: CRAZY TAXI 2 – ANGRY DRIVER
description: An open-world taxi driving game featuring realistic vehicle physics, dynamic traffic AI, mission-based gameplay, and an expansive city environment. Includes vehicle customization, upgrades, and challenging delivery missions across diverse weather conditions.
tagline: Vehicle Physics & Traffic AI | Open World Development
myRole: Led the development of this open-world driving game from concept to launch. Designed and implemented the complete pedestrian and traffic systems using NavMesh AI pathfinding. Created realistic vehicle physics with custom tuning for authentic driving feel. Developed multiple mission types with varying difficulty levels. Collaborated closely with a graphic designer to deliver a polished final product. Utilized pre-built tools and assets to optimize development time while maintaining high quality.

name: MODERN WARFARE SHOOTER
description: A AAA-quality modern warfare FPS featuring cinematic single-player campaign, competitive multiplayer, cooperative modes, and battle royale. Includes realistic weapon handling, destructible environments, dynamic cover systems, and next-gen graphics optimization.
tagline: FPS Level Design & NPC AI | Multiplayer Systems
myRole: Led a team of developers and designers to deliver this AAA-quality modern warfare FPS. Implemented core combat systems including weapon handling, player movement, and environmental interactions. Developed realistic shooting mechanics with recoil patterns, bullet spread, and weapon sway. Created weapon customization system with attachment upgrades and loadout management. Designed and executed immersive level layouts with strategic cover points and combat zones. Handled all NPC and AI behaviors including enemy pathfinding, tactical positioning, and combat AI. Implemented multiplayer networking for competitive and cooperative gameplay modes. Optimized rendering pipeline and game assets for smooth mobile performance.

name: UNDERGROUND RACING
description: A high-octane underground street racing game featuring realistic drift physics, nitrous boost systems, car customization, and competitive online multiplayer. Includes story mode, time attacks, drift challenges, and extensive vehicle tuning options.
tagline: Vehicle Physics & Drifting | Multiplayer Racing Expert
myRole: Implemented realistic vehicle physics with custom drift mechanics including handbrake, counter-steering, and tire grip simulation. Developed real-time multiplayer synchronization for competitive racing. Created extensive car customization system with visual and performance upgrades. Designed 20+ race tracks with varying terrain and weather conditions.

name: ZOMBIE SHOOTER 3D
description: An intense survival horror FPS with wave-based zombie gameplay, diverse weapon arsenal, and immersive storyline. Features realistic gore systems, dynamic lighting, procedural horde behavior, and cooperative multiplayer modes.
tagline: FPS AI & Horror VFX | Wave-Based Game Design
myRole: Developed zombie AI using state machines and pathfinding for intelligent horde behavior. Created weapon systems including firearms, explosives, and melee with realistic damage models. Implemented VFX for gore, explosions, and environmental effects. Designed wave management system with increasing difficulty and special enemy types.

name: BUS SIMULATOR
description: A hyper-realistic bus driving simulator featuring multiple routes, authentic bus physics, traffic AI, dynamic weather, and an expansive open city. Includes career mode, passenger simulations, bus maintenance, and VR support.
tagline: Vehicle Simulation & Open World | Traffic AI Specialist
myRole: Implemented detailed bus physics with authentic steering, braking, and passenger weight simulation. Developed traffic AI system with realistic driving behaviors and pedestrian pathfinding. Created dynamic weather system affecting visibility and vehicle handling. Designed 10+ detailed city routes with points of interest and realistic traffic patterns.

name: FLAG MASTER
description: A globally popular quiz game featuring world flags, capitals, and geography trivia. Includes multiple game modes, difficulty levels, offline play, leaderboards, and multilingual support spanning 150+ countries.
myRole: Developed this quiz runner game where players run through levels while answering geography questions. Implemented adaptive difficulty algorithms that adjust question complexity based on player performance. Created smooth animations and intuitive UI for seamless gameplay experience. Built localization system supporting 30+ languages for global audience. Implemented offline mode with local data persistence and cloud sync. Designed engaging game mechanics combining running gameplay with educational trivia.

name: FLYWORLD – 2D FLIGHT
description: A retro-styled 2D flight simulator with challenging aerial courses, power-ups, enemy formations, and boss battles. Features procedural level generation, high score leaderboards, and satisfying arcade mechanics.
myRole: Implemented realistic 2D flight physics including aircraft handling for takeoff, cruising, and landing mechanics. Created smooth analog control system for responsive piloting experience. Developed procedural level generation for infinite replayability. Designed engaging enemy AI patterns and challenging boss battle mechanics. Implemented particle systems for explosions, thrusters, smoke trails, and environmental effects.

name: TASBEHAT TILE MATCH
description: A culturally themed tile-matching puzzle game combining Islamic art elements with classic match-3 mechanics. Features relaxing gameplay, spiritual content integration, and educational elements about Islamic culture.
myRole: Developed unique 2-tile matching puzzle mechanics (matching 2 tiles instead of 3). Created tile-matching system with special tiles, chain combos, and cascade effects. Built algorithm for dynamic puzzle generation with varying difficulty levels. Designed elegant UI incorporating Islamic geometric patterns and calligraphy. Implemented localization for Arabic, English, and other languages.

name: Alpha Battle
description: A strategic gladiator management game combining team management, RPG elements, and turn-based arena combat. Features hero progression, equipment crafting, tactical AI, and competitive PvP leagues.
myRole: Developed this idle automatic battle game where gladiator battles happen automatically. Implemented gladiator management system including training, upgrades, equipment management, and recruitment. Created automatic battle system where player watches battles unfold and manages their gladiator roster. Designed progression system for upgrading gladiator stats and abilities. Implemented equipment crafting and loadout management for competitive arena battles.

name: TRUCK SIMULATOR: OFFROAD 4×4
description: A realistic off-road truck simulation featuring challenging terrain, mud physics, rock crawling, and extensive vehicle customization. Includes multiplayer convoys, cargo delivery missions, and dynamic weather.
myRole: Implemented realistic off-road vehicle physics including tire deformation, mud adhesion, and suspension travel. Created terrain interaction system with dynamic tire tracks and terrain deformation. Designed challenging off-road tracks with obstacles and environmental hazards. Optimized for mobile with adaptive quality settings.

name: FRUIT BLAST SAGA
description: An addictive match-3 puzzle game with colorful graphics, hundreds of levels, special power-ups, and events. Features booster combinations, limited moves challenges, and regular content updates.
tagline: Match-3 Casual Games | Level Design Expert
myRole: Developed core match-3 logic with matching detection, cascade effects, and special tile combinations. Created power-up systems including bombs, rockets, and color blasters. Designed 500+ levels with increasing difficulty and special objectives. Implemented live events system and daily reward mechanics.

name: RAINING ROCKETS
description: A fast-paced arcade survival game where players dodge falling rockets, collect power-ups, and upgrade defenses. Features endless gameplay, high score chasing, and satisfying destruction physics.
tagline: Arcade Gameplay & Spawning Systems | Casual Expert
myRole: Implemented core gameplay loop with rocket spawning algorithms and collision detection. Created power-up system with shields, slow-motion, and multi-ball effects. Designed upgrade mechanics for permanent progression. Implemented dynamic difficulty scaling based on player performance.

name: Genius Gen: Kids AI Learning
description: An innovative educational app using artificial intelligence to personalize learning for children. Features adaptive content, speech recognition, interactive exercises, progress tracking, and engaging gamification.
tagline: AI & Speech Recognition | Educational Game Design
myRole: Developed complete parent-child relationship system where parents create accounts and assign tasks to their children. Built task management system allowing parents to set daily learning activities and track progress. Created comprehensive dashboard for parents to view their child's performance, completed tasks, and learning analytics. Implemented adaptive learning algorithms that personalize content based on child's progress and performance. Designed progress tracking system with detailed analytics and reports presented to parents.

name: TOP-DOWN RUNNER
description: A fast-paced top-down endless runner with procedurally generated levels, obstacle avoidance, coin collection, and character upgrades. Features daily challenges, achievements, and responsive touch controls.
myRole: Developed core endless runner mechanics with procedural level generation. Created object pooling system for optimal performance. Implemented responsive touch controls and gesture recognition. Designed dynamic difficulty scaling and daily challenge system.

name: STRING THEORY
description: An innovative educational app designed to make learning complex mathematical equations and discrete structures fun and accessible for school kids. Features interactive visualizations, gamified learning, and brain training exercises.
tagline: Math Made Fun | Brain Training & Learning
myRole: Served as Lead Developer for this educational project targeting US-based schools. Designed and developed interactive mathematical problem-solving features presented in a fun, GUI-based format. Created engaging brain training exercises to enhance cognitive abilities and simplify complex discrete structure problems for younger students.

name: HUNTING GAME
description: A first-person hunting simulation game with realistic wildlife, weapon mechanics, and immersive outdoor environments. Features various hunting modes, weapon customization, and tracking AI.
myRole: Developed first-person shooting mechanics and weapon handling systems. Created wildlife AI behaviors for realistic animal movements and patterns. Implemented tracking and detection systems for immersive hunting gameplay.

name: PARKING SIMULATOR
description: A realistic parking simulation game with multiple vehicle types, challenging parking scenarios, and detailed physics. Features various difficulty levels and vehicle customization.
myRole: Implemented realistic vehicle physics and handling for parking mechanics. Designed challenging parking scenarios with varying difficulty levels. Created responsive touch controls for mobile gameplay.

name: SHIP RIVER CROSSING
description: A Roblox-style building game where players create ships and navigate rivers to cross to the other side. Features physics-based ship building, water simulation, and challenging river obstacles.
myRole: Developed physics-based ship building system allowing players to construct vessels from various parts. Implemented water simulation and river current mechanics level design with. Created challenging obstacles and goals.

name: TOP DOWN SHOOTER
description: A fast-paced top-down shooter game built for WebGL with responsive controls and action-packed gameplay. Features multiple weapons, enemy waves, and boss battles.
myRole: Built complete top-down shooter mechanics with various weapon types including pistols, rifles, shotguns, and special weapons. Developed intelligent enemy AI system with pathfinding, tactical positioning, and coordinated group behaviors. Created multiple level designs with increasing difficulty, unique enemy compositions, and environmental hazards. Implemented wave-based progression system with boss battles at the end of each chapter. Optimized for WebGL performance ensuring smooth 60fps gameplay in browser.

name: DANCING CUBE
description: A rhythm-based dancing game where players follow music keypoints to make movements. Each level is designed around different music tracks with synchronized movements and gestures.
myRole: Developed rhythm synchronization system that maps player movements to music keypoints. Created dynamic animation system for smooth dance moves. Designed multiple levels based on different music tracks with varying difficulty.

name: STORM SURVIVAL
description: A hyper-casual game where players build and upgrade houses to survive approaching storms. Features house customization, storm progression, and survival mechanics.
myRole: Designed and implemented house building and upgrade systems. Created storm progression mechanics with increasing difficulty. Implemented game economy for in-game currency and upgrades.

name: CASTLE BATTLE
description: A 2D castle building game where 2 players compete (multiplayer or against AI) to build and defend their castles. Features building mechanics, combat system, and last player standing win condition.
myRole: Developed comprehensive 2D castle building system where players construct walls, towers, and defensive structures using collected resources. Created strategic combat system with unit deployment, projectile attacks, and siege warfare mechanics. Implemented intelligent AI opponent with multiple difficulty levels that makes tactical decisions. Built real-time multiplayer system allowing 2 players to battle simultaneously. Designed win condition system where last player with surviving castle wins. Implemented unit upgrade tree and special ability system for strategic depth.

name: PRE SCHOOL ACADEMY
description: A comprehensive pre-school educational app handling academic management from KG to 5th class. Features user authentication, database management, daily tasks, progress tracking, and interactive learning activities.
myRole: Developed complete user authentication and login system with role-based access. Implemented database architecture for managing student data, academic records, and progress tracking. Created daily task system where students complete interactive learning activities. Handled backend integration and data synchronization.

name: SIEMENS CITY BUILDER
description: A SimCity-style city building simulation game created for Dubai Expo in partnership with Siemens. Players design and build their own cities with various buildings, infrastructure, and utilities while learning about sustainable urban development and smart city concepts.
myRole: Developed core city building mechanics allowing users to place and customize various building types. Created simulation systems for utilities, traffic, and resource management. Designed intuitive touch-based interface for interactive exhibit experience at Dubai Expo. Collaborated with Siemens team to integrate sustainable city concepts.
